title: Orbital Cannon For Dummies
description: Orbital Cannon For Redstone Dummies and Lazy People
body: A Simple Mod to Add two items: The Stab Stone and the Nuke, both of these do semi-similar to cubicmeter's orbital cannon, crafted with some late-game things, these recipes are VERY hard and NOT easy to mass produce (please don't, the creative test world is a mess)
